title: pelargonium gibbosum
intro: Pelargonium gibbosum, also known as the 'Round-leaved Geranium', is a succulent shrub native to the Western Cape region of South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium gibbosum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and soothing sore throats, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium gibbosum are often made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate respiratory issues.
